steps.title: Find the key relationship
steps.content: The key signal is the pairing of “the all-female cast” with “an array of female characters.” The blank must convey how these two concepts relate—what the cast is or how it connects to the character roles.

steps.title: Apply the right word
steps.content: The target meaning is that the cast consists of or is made up of these character roles. Comprises conveys exactly this—it means “to be composed of”—so “the cast comprises an array of female characters” expresses this relationship directly. The other three options describe actions rather than composition. That matches choice C — C is correct.
